'''NT-311''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served in the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served as the point man in his [[Squad/Legends|squad]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], NT-311 was stationed on the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] when it [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|captured]] the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']], which contained the [[Battle of Toprawa|stolen]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] of the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]]. Despite the 501st's victory during the [[lightfight]] that followed, the Rebel [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] escaped with the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] plans.

==Biography==
NT-311<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Complete Visual Dictionary" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> in the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]],<ref name="BF2" /> an elite stormtrooper [[Legion/Legends|unit]] commanded by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="BFII">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. NT-311 served as his [[Squad/Legends|squad's]] point man. Communications with [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] greatly enhanced his unit's [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] coverage.<ref name="JKTCG" /> NT-311 was stationed aboard the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']],<ref name="Note">During the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]], the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] captured the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|blockade runner]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] and deployed [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] aboard the blockade runner, as shown in the [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. As [[Leland Chee]] confirmed on {{Facebook|noprofile=1|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=180935065406571&id=201820953172172&comment_id=441169&offset=0&total_comments=1&ref=notif&notif_t=share_comment|author=Leland Chee|date=2013-07-01|nobackup=1}} that NT-311 partook in the attack on the ''Tantive IV'', then NT-311 was thus also stationed aboard the ''Devastator'' during that battle.</ref> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref>

That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC" /> the ''Devastator'' [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|captured]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Consular ship/Legends|consular ship]],<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|blockade runner]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']],<ref name="DB2">{{DB|starship|tantiveiv|Rebel blockade runners}}</ref> which contained the [[Battle of Toprawa|stolen]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] of the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. NT-311 was among the stormtroopers who participated in the subsequent boarding of the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]].<ref name="Note" /> The 501st [[Lightfight|engaged]] the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] defending the ''Tantive IV'' in battle, which ended in victory for the 501st Legion and in Senator Organa's capture. However, the Rebel [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], the latter of whom possessed the stolen [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] plans, evacuated the ship in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Equipment==
NT-311 wore the standard suit of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]. He wielded an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
NT-311 was first mentioned by a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" /> Although initially unconfirmed, [[Leland Chee]], the maintainer of [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Holocron continuity database]], would later on verify that the ''Jedi Knights Trading Card Game'' depicted NT-311 as a stormtrooper who boarded the ''Tantive IV'' during the ''Devastator''{{'s}} overtaking of the vessel,<ref name="KotC">{{Facebook|noprofile=1|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=180935065406571&id=201820953172172&comment_id=441169&offset=0&total_comments=1&ref=notif&notif_t=share_comment|author=Leland Chee|date=2013-07-01|nobackup=1}}</ref> events shown in the [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="ANH" />
